headline: SpaceX IPO: rockets, AI losses and Musk in control
summary: SpaceX is inviting investors to bet on Elon Musk's vision of AI data centers in space and humans on Mars.The sky-high valuation for SpaceX -- nearly $1.8 trillion -- is based on the idea that his legendary run will continue and that Musk can achieve his goal of data centers in space and putting people on Mars.

headline: XPENG Invited to CVPR for the Third Time, Showcasing China's Advances in Physical AI to the World
summary: XPENG (NYSE: XPEV, HKEX: 9868), a leading China-based high-tech company, kicks off its key presence at CVPR 2026 (The IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition). Dr. Xianming Liu, Head of General Intelligence Center at XPENG, spoke at the inaugural Workshop on Deployment of Foundation Models for Embodied AI (WDFM-EAI), sharing insights with global counterparts including Tesla, NVIDIA and Waymo. This marks XPENG's third attendance at the prestigious conference.

headline: Red Metals Raises $10M to Reshore American Copper Refining and Build a New Supply Chain for Finished Copper Products
summary: CHARLESTON, S.C., June 04, 2026--Red Metals, a next-generation copper manufacturer, today announced $10 million in Seed funding and plans to build a $70 million facility in Charleston, South Carolina, expected to create at least 45 jobs in its initial phase of operations. The company has developed a novel copper refining process designed to reshore the manufacturing of finished copper products to the United States.

The company has developed a novel copper refining process designed to reshore the manufacturing of finished copper products to the United States.
